# BP-141 positive: a snake_case named placeholder has no matching db tag.
lang: go
file: BP-141-vulnerable.go
variant: sqlx-named-untagged
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"

	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type User struct {
	UserID int
	Name   string
}

func insertUser(db *sqlx.DB, user User) error {
	_, err := db.NamedExec("INSERT INTO users (user_id, name) VALUES (:user_id, :name)", user)
	return fmt.Errorf("insert user: %w", err)
}
